aeo_readiness.summary: Wayne County HVAC has a solid foundation but lacks the comprehensive conversational content and authority signals needed for AI assistants to confidently cite them as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Expand content to include detailed How-To guides and troubleshooting FAQs.
Implement LocalBusiness schema with service area and detailed contact information.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and lacks customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all major directories.
action_items: Expand NAP listings to industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The website lacks in-depth conversational content that AI models prioritize for citation.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding a comprehensive FAQ section with detailed answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to ChatGPT and other AI models.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Wayne County HVAC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with AI-optimized content receive higher visibility and engagement in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates detailed FAQs, How-To guides, and authority signals to make your business the go-to HVAC expert in AI search.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Expertise for Wayne County HVAC
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out in AI search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content for AI-driven visibility and growth.
